steps.title: Identify the defining signal
steps.content: The first sentence announces a general accomplishment (Latimer improved the design). The second sentence specifies what that improvement was (making it more durable through a particular method). The transition must show this movement from general claim to specific detail.

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content:
”Specifically” introduces a particular instance or elaboration of a preceding general claim.

The other three either impose temporal sequence (Soon) or signal contradiction (However, Regardless), neither of which applies when elaborating on a general claim.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
